extra.reason: Implemented check_manifest(manifest, max_skew_seconds) returning (ok, reason) enforcing signature + issued_at/expires_at freshness with a skew window; verify_manifest now delegates to it (bool). Freshness enforced only when timestamps present. Unit test covers fresh/expired/not-yet-valid/no-timestamp. 13 tests pass, pyflakes clean.

Implemented minimal protocol-level admission helper: AdmissionPolicy, AdmissionDecision, admit_manifest, and domain_evidence_verifier. It checks manifest signature/freshness, required expiry, federation membership, protocol compatibility, signed_http requirement, endpoint scheme/private literal IP/domain allowlist, and optional host-supplied evidence verifier callback. Added tests for accepted domain proof, bad claims, required expiry, and domain mismatch. Verified: 17 unit tests pass, 4 integration tests pass with localhost socket approval, compileall passes, pyflakes clean.

Implemented replay protection with a Protocol seam. Added pimx.protocols.NonceStore and moved the concrete in-memory NonceCache to pimx.replay as a bounded, TTL-based, thread-safe implementation. verify_signed_request now accepts NonceStore, keeping top-level pimx.NonceCache for compatibility. Also added a protocols.EvidenceVerifier seam for admission evidence, following the qiao protocols/ style. Tests added for nonce expiry, replay rejection, max-size eviction, invalid limits, and admission protocol usage. Verified: 21 unit tests pass, 4 socket integration tests pass with localhost approval, compileall passes, pyflakes clean.
issued_at/expires_at now AwareDatetime; check_manifest uses direct comparisons; removed _check_window/_parse_iso; wire form pinned to UTC 'Z' via field_serializer
canonical_bytes now uses rfc8785.dumps (JCS); added rfc8785 dep
added find_jwk() helper (signing) reused in check_manifest + client; added FederationClient._send collapsing introduce/query/get_members/fetch_record

FederationClient now uses httpx.AsyncClient with async methods + async ctx manager; verify_signed_request is async; federated_query fans out concurrently via asyncio.gather; SSRF DNS moved off the event loop via run_in_executor. Integration harness/tests migrated to async (per-node event loop bridges the sync http.server threads).

Deleted src/pimx/replay.py (NonceCache) and protocols/replay.py (NonceStore Protocol). verify_signed_request takes an injected cashews Cache and claims the nonce via set(expire=max_skew, exist=False) AFTER signature verification. Tests use cashews mem:// backend. Added test_bad_signature_does_not_burn_the_nonce.

EvidenceVerifier.__call__ is async; admit_manifest is async and awaits the verifier; domain_evidence_verifier is async def. EvidenceVerifier Protocol kept (host trust material), unlike NonceStore which was deleted.

pimx core no longer depends on cashews: moved it to a [cashews] optional-extra + dev group. Added structural NonceCache Protocol (protocols/nonce.py) matching cashews' set(key,value,expire,exist) shape, so a cashews Cache is injectable with no adapter and core imports zero cache backend (proven: cashews not in sys.modules after import pimx, and pimx imports cleanly when cashews is unavailable). verify_signed_request types cache: NonceCache | None. README documents host-side wiring: pydantic-settings PIMX_ prefix -> Cache.setup(dsn) -> inject.
README refined for production usage, uv-first install flow, localized replay-cache guidance, and practical federation scenarios.
Scoped replay cache keys by federation/source/target/nonce, documented cache=None semantics, and added coverage for the exact cache set call.

Manifest.membership replaced with typed Membership sub-model (models.py); client.py uses attribute access; malformed membership now raises ValidationError at Manifest construction. Exported from pimx package.
Extracted typed fan-out primitive (src/pimx/fanout.py: Outcome, PeerOutcome, FanoutReport, classify_transport_call, fan_out); federated_query rebuilt on it with unchanged external coverage semantics.

Extracted is_disallowed_ip() into new src/pimx/net.py; client.py._assert_public_host and admission.py._check_endpoint both delegate to it instead of each having their own copy of the private/loopback/link-local/reserved check.

Added sign_model/verify_model generic helpers to signing.py; sign_manifest, build_signed_request, check_manifest, verify_signed_request, client.py's _verify_response, and tests/harness.py's _sign all delegate to them instead of inlining model_dump+sign_dict/verify_dict. Exported from pimx package.

Added frozen-dataclass Coverage/SkippedPeer to client.py (consistent with AdmissionDecision/PeerOutcome's dataclass convention for internal, never-serialized results); federated_query returns tuple[list[QueryResult], Coverage] instead of tuple[list[QueryResult], dict]; updated the two coverage assertions in test_federation.py to attribute access. admission_evidence/disclosure_context/provenance/QueryResponse.coverage untouched as scoped.
FederationClient.query now verifies signed QueryResponse payloads and raises ResponseSignatureError for unsigned or invalid responses; added regression coverage.
Removed fanout.py and inlined the small per-peer try/except classification in FederationClient.federated_query; deleted fanout tests and exports.
Trimmed pimx.__all__ and root imports to the documented public surface; moved test harness use of sign_model to pimx.signing.
Changed SignedRequest and IntroduceRequest timestamps to AwareDatetime with canonical JSON serialization and centralized utc_now/iso_z helpers.
Moved SSRFError and the DNS-resolving _assert_public_host guard into net.py; client imports them from there.
Added shared _host_in_domain helper and reused it for domain evidence and endpoint allow-list checks.
Made sign_dict pure, collapsed automatic cooldown state flips to cooldown_until, and moved InvalidSignature import to module scope.
Moved EvidenceVerifier into admission.py, kept protocols re-exports compatible, and avoided protocol package import cycles.
verify_signed_request now requires actual HTTP method/path, rejects mismatches before nonce claim, harness and README pass bound values, and tests cover method/path mismatch plus nonce preservation.

FederationClient now verifies signed IntroduceResponse and MembersResponse payloads like QueryResponse, raises ResponseSignatureError on missing/bad signatures, and tests cover unsigned, invalid, and valid signed responses.

Top-level pimx exports now include JWK/public-key helpers, canonical/base64/body-hash helpers, response signature constants/errors, and signing fixture helpers; README API map and tests cover public imports.
FederationClient.fetch_manifest now verifies manifest signature/freshness by default and raises ManifestVerificationError for unsigned or tampered manifests; README and tests now match that behavior.

Out of scope for the pimx library backlog. Plakard/main-project dependency integration should be tracked in the Plakard repository after pimx is packaged; this repo should only define and document the library contract.

Out of scope for pimx after boundary cleanup. Semantic query fan-out, deadline policy, result merging, and coverage reporting belong to the host/Plakard layer; pimx should only sign/verify arbitrary host requests and provide manifest/membership exchange helpers.

README now documents install, runnable manifest/request quickstart, generic host-adapter verification, protocol-client usage, module map, scenarios, production notes, and public API exports. Quickstart verified with uv run python; pytest passes. federated_query is intentionally omitted because semantic query/fan-out is host-owned.
IntroduceResponse.accepted_until is now AwareDatetime with ISO-Z serialization, known_peer_count is modeled per ADR-005 §8.2, and the JSON round-trip plus federation/unit suite pass.
Implemented optional Manifest disclosure, limits, and capability_summary_url fields with exports and round-trip tests.
Promoted response signature verification to public signing.verify_response_signature, re-exported it, kept client behavior delegated, and added direct unit coverage.
Added revocation notice/response wire models, get_revocations client verification, missing endpoint error, public notice verifier, exports, and unit/client coverage.
Added optional max_body_bytes guard and public check_body_size helper; oversized bodies return body_too_large before hash verification or nonce claim; tests cover bounded and unbounded behavior.
Added RateLimiter protocol and in-memory TokenBucketRateLimiter keyed by peer node_id using Manifest.limits.max_query_rps_per_peer, with refill tests and README production-backend note.
Added apply_revocation_notice helper that verifies trusted issuer key and federation id before revoking known peers, with no-op behavior for untrusted, wrong-federation, and unknown-peer notices.

Added MembershipStore protocol for host persistence, re-exported it from protocols and top-level pimx, typed apply_revocation_notice against the protocol, and documented Mongo/Postgres-backed host usage.
Added DisclosurePolicy and disclose_members projection helper, excluding ineligible/denied peers and applying requester disclosure; harness now uses the helper for /members responses.
Added pure audit_record builder with ISO-Z timestamp, optional ADR audit fields, extra context support, public export, README note, and unit coverage.
Replaced raw admission_evidence dict typing with tagged evidence models, typed domain_proof evidence, generic future evidence fallback, updated domain verifier, exports, and round-trip tests.
Added CapabilitySummary wire model, get_capability_summary client method with signed response verification, missing endpoint error, exports, and model/client tests.

Implemented key-continuity policy helper for manifest refresh: no-change accept, old-key-signed rotation accept, evidence-authorized rotation accept, unauthorized rotation quarantine as stale_manifest, and local policy reject. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 71 passed.

Implemented one-shot refresh_peer_manifest helper with typed ManifestRefreshDecision. It calls FederationClient.fetch_manifest once, classifies expired fetched manifests as stale_manifest quarantine, rejects revision rollback and policy-denied rotations, accepts revision bumps, and surfaces key-continuity outcomes without adding any scheduler or loop. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 77 passed.

Implemented FederationClient.get_protocol(peer) and get_health(peer), flexible ProtocolResponse and HealthResponse models, harness /health support and richer /protocol output. Unit tests cover parsed healthy responses and unreachable peer failures; integration test covers harness protocol and health probes. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 82 passed.

Implemented framework-neutral probe_peer_health() and PeerHealthProbeResult. The helper calls get_protocol/get_health once, classifies success, protocol failure, health failure, and unhealthy status, and returns a suggested MembershipTable state without any scheduler/background task. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 86 passed.

Covered one-shot health and refresh boundary tests: probe_peer_health success/protocol failure/health failure/unhealthy status classification; refresh_peer_manifest unchanged/revision bump/expired stale_manifest/signed rotation/unauthorized rotation/policy-denied rotation decisions; harness exposes /health and integration probes /protocol and /health. No scheduler/background API was added. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 86 passed.

Implemented refresh_discovered_members() with typed DiscoveryRefreshReport/DiscoveryOutcome. The helper polls eligible peers using signed get_members responses, treats member refs as hints, caps and deduplicates work, fetches new manifest URLs through fetch_manifest/SSRF checks, verifies node_id, skips self/existing peers, runs local admit_manifest, admits only accepted peers, and reports accepted/rejected/skipped/failed without aborting on per-member failures. Tests cover seed discovery, local policy rejection, duplicate/self/existing skip, per_peer_cap, SSRF rejection, node_id mismatch, and timeout/HTTP/malformed failure isolation. Verified: uv run pytest passes with 93 passed.
Added src/pimx/py.typed for PEP 561 inline typing. Verified uv build --wheel includes pimx/py.typed in dist/pimx-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl, and uv run pytest passes with 93 passed.

Renamed project/distribution/import package from pimx to federlet. Updated pyproject package path, README/docs, tests, imports, header/cache prefixes, uv.lock via uv sync, and source package directory. Verified: uv sync uninstalled local pimx and installed federlet; uv run pytest passes with 93 passed; uv build --wheel creates dist/federlet-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl containing federlet/py.typed; uv run python imports federlet successfully.

Added Apache-2.0 LICENSE at repo root and declared license = "Apache-2.0" in pyproject. Verified uv build creates both sdist and wheel; sdist includes LICENSE, wheel includes federlet-0.1.0.dist-info/licenses/LICENSE, and wheel metadata has License-Expression: Apache-2.0 / License-File: LICENSE.

Completed PyPI metadata: README long description, Apache-2.0 license expression, authors/maintainers, project URLs, classifiers, keywords, and explicit sdist include list. Verified isolated uv build creates clean wheel+sdist; sdist excludes .beads and includes LICENSE/README/docs/src/tests/pyproject/uv.lock; wheel metadata includes license, classifiers, URLs, author/maintainer, and README content; uvx twine check passes for both artifacts; uv run pytest passes with 93 passed.
Completed: configured ruff and mypy, formatted repo, and verified gates
Completed: added GitHub Actions CI matrix for ruff, mypy, and pytest
Completed: renamed/publicized GitHub repo, set topics, and updated README/package metadata for discoverability
Implemented verify_peer_request inbound helper; recut introductions to use the existing signed-request envelope against the embedded manifest; updated ADR/README/tests.
Implemented verify_peer_request inbound helper; recut introductions to use the existing signed-request envelope against the embedded manifest; updated ADR/README/tests.
Implemented federlet.query wire models and signed result-card helpers; added tests and docs; no query execution/fan-out logic added.
Added federlet.prelude and federlet.lowlevel tiered namespaces; updated README to lead with prelude while keeping root imports backwards-compatible; added import coverage.

Added runnable framework-neutral stdlib host example using FederationClient outbound calls, verify_peer_request inbound auth, host-owned trust lookup, nonce cache, and signed responses; linked from README.
Added sign_capability_summary and bootstrap_from_seeds helpers with unit and harness-backed integration coverage; updated README exports/scenario docs.

Excluded intentionally: federlet should remain framework-neutral. FastAPI-specific auth wiring would add dependency/API maintenance and duplicate the now-small verify_peer_request host pattern. Keep examples framework-neutral instead.

Added additive FederationNode facade over existing primitives for verify_inbound, known-peer auth, sign_manifest, capability summaries, seed bootstrap, discovery, refresh, and peer selection; covered by integration harness flow.
Added build_signed_manifest publication facade; exported through root/prelude; updated README quickstart and runnable host example; added unit coverage.
Added typed signed response helpers for introduce, members, revocations, and query responses; exported via root/prelude; updated host example and tests.
Implemented private discovery accumulator; targeted discovery tests, ruff, and mypy pass.
Added CHANGELOG, SemVer/tagging policy, user-facing API-layer docs, bumped 0.2.0, tagged v0.2.0, and published federlet 0.2.0 to PyPI.
Implemented breaking domain-neutral code refactor: ResultRef attributes, CapabilitySummary facets, required host protocol versions, explicit manifest_url with no path guessing; tests pass.
Implemented breaking domain-neutral code refactor: ResultRef attributes, CapabilitySummary facets, required host protocol versions, explicit manifest_url with no path guessing; tests pass.
Implemented breaking domain-neutral code refactor: ResultRef attributes, CapabilitySummary facets, required host protocol versions, explicit manifest_url with no path guessing; tests pass.
Implemented breaking domain-neutral code refactor: ResultRef attributes, CapabilitySummary facets, required host protocol versions, explicit manifest_url with no path guessing; tests pass.
Completed docs sweep, ADR universal-core rewrite with Plakard profile appendix, and 0.3.0 release metadata; ruff, mypy, and tests pass.
Completed docs sweep, ADR universal-core rewrite with Plakard profile appendix, and 0.3.0 release metadata; ruff, mypy, and tests pass.
Completed docs sweep, ADR universal-core rewrite with Plakard profile appendix, and 0.3.0 release metadata; ruff, mypy, and tests pass.

All 7 refactor tasks completed: federlet now exposes domain-neutral ResultRef attributes, capability facets, explicit protocol identifiers, explicit manifest URLs, updated docs/ADR, and 0.3.0 release metadata with green quality gates.

Replaced ResultRef with strict FederatedResult payload/provenance/signature envelope; QueryResponse now carries FederatedResult; exports, tests, README, ADR-005, CHANGELOG 0.4.0, and package metadata updated. Verified full pytest, ruff, and src/federlet grep acceptance.

Replaced query/result public models with generic operation envelopes: OperationRequest, OperationResponse, OperationItem, PayloadProvenance, and operation signing/verification helpers. Focused operation/export tests pass; old query/result symbols are gone from src/federlet and unit tests.

Removed capability summary from core: deleted CapabilitySummary model and capability module, removed publication/client/node facade/export surfaces, and shifted host protocol metadata to generic Manifest.extensions. Focused manifest/client/export tests pass.

Manifest now exposes opaque extensions for host protocol metadata; build_signed_manifest accepts and signs extensions; tests verify host-owned extension metadata round-trips without core interpretation.

Scrubbed public core vocabulary: README, ADR, pyproject, examples, and src/federlet now use neutral federation/operation/payload language; removed directory/catalogue/query/result/capability-summary host semantics from the core public surface.
Added 0.4.0 migration guidance for the domain-agnostic operation API in README and CHANGELOG, including removed/replaced query, result, capability-summary, manifest extension, and limit field names.

Reconciled the partial ResultRef-to-FederatedResult working tree into the broader operation-envelope design. Core code/tests now use OperationRequest/OperationResponse/OperationItem/PayloadProvenance; old partial symbols remain only in migration/history docs.

Completed domain-agnostic core refactor: generic operation envelopes replace query/result models, capability summary removed from core, host metadata moved to Manifest.extensions, docs/package metadata scrubbed to neutral federation language, migration notes added, and full pytest plus ruff pass.

Neutralized fixture/example identifiers: replaced dir:* node IDs, supplier-network-prod, and directory-flavored example hostnames with node/example-federation terminology. Verified full pytest passed and ruff passed; final identifier audit for dir:/supplier-network is clean.
Neutrality conformance test + ADR invariant added
well_known_url helper added, exported, tested
Invariant lock module + ADR baseline note added
Auth-method verifier hook added, exported, documented, tested
Cert-identity primitive added, exported, documented, tested
OIDC denylist + dependency guard + ADR note added
send_operation + fan_out_operation added, exported, documented, tested
implemented
implemented
all children implemented and verified
implemented
Node.membership_table retyped MembershipTable->MembershipStore port; default_factory unchanged; all call sites already on the port; mypy+ruff clean, 166 tests pass

Split storage from policy: MembershipStore port shrunk to get/upsert/values; backoff+eligibility now pure federlet fns (admit/set_state/record_success/record_failure/eligible_peers + CooldownPolicy) applied over records and persisted via upsert; MembershipTable is a ~13-line dict wrapper (no policy/config); apply_revocation_notice + node.py + discovery.py + tests migrated; new policy fns exported from package API. mypy+ruff clean, 166 tests pass.

MemberRecord converted dataclass->pydantic BaseModel in house style (AwareDatetime + field_serializer/iso_z); is_eligible preserved; policy fns still mutate in place. JSON round-trip (model_dump(mode=json)->model_validate) verified for all fields incl tz-aware datetimes + PeerState enum via new test. Hosts can now drop hand-rolled PeerRecord mirror. mypy(src) clean, ruff clean, 167 tests pass.

Documented durability contract: README module rows updated + new 'Membership durability' section (thin MembershipStore CRUD port, federlet-owned policy fns, MembershipTable=reference default, read->apply->persist pattern) and host-owned manifest rehydration subsection (member/manifest asymmetry). Strengthened FederationNode docstring to state peer_manifests + membership_table must be rehydrated at startup. MembershipStore/MembershipTable docstrings already state the contract (F2/F3). mypy+ruff clean, 167 tests pass.

All four children complete: F1 port injection, F2 storage/policy split, F3 pydantic MemberRecord, F4 durability docs. Membership durability boundary landed; federlet ready for host-owned durable adapters (redis/SQL/json) reusing federlet policy. mypy+ruff clean, 167 tests pass.

Converted MembershipStore to async get/upsert/values/delete; MembershipTable implements async CRUD; eligible_peers/apply_revocation_notice and node/discovery callers now await the store; tests/harness updated for async API. Verified with ruff check, ruff format --check, mypy(src), and full pytest (167 passed).

Added async ManifestStore port with upsert/delete/values, exported it, added optional FederationNode.manifest_store, async hydrate()/__aenter__ cache hydration, and write-through _remember_manifest at discover/_record_peer/_apply_refresh_decision. Hot verify_known_inbound remains a dict read. Verified with ruff, mypy(src), and targeted unit/federation tests.

Added per-node asyncio lifecycle lock, guarded hydrate/admit/refresh/revocation mutations, added _forget_manifest, evicted manifests from cache and ManifestStore on refresh reject and node-level revocation, and kept verify_known_inbound lockless. Verified by new regression tests plus ruff, format check, mypy(src), and full pytest (174 passed).

Added async fake ManifestStore tests covering manifest_store=None compatibility, write-through on admit, refresh-accept revision persistence, async hydration plus verify_known_inbound, refresh-reject eviction, revocation eviction, and lifecycle-lock interleave preventing revoked manifest resurrection. Verified with ruff, format check, mypy(src), and full pytest (174 passed).

Updated README durability docs for async MembershipStore and ManifestStore, documented hydrate/__aenter__ and Plakard x39 federlet>=0.6 note, added 0.6.0 changelog with breaking async-store migration notes, and bumped pyproject/uv.lock to 0.6.0. Public ManifestStore exports were added in A2. Verified with ruff, format check, mypy(src), and full pytest (174 passed).

Epic complete: converted MembershipStore to async, added async ManifestStore write-through/hydration, added lifecycle lock with manifest eviction on reject/revocation, covered behavior with regression tests, updated docs/changelog/version for federlet 0.6. Verified final gates: ruff check, ruff format --check, mypy(src), full pytest (174 passed).

Converted RateLimiter.allow and TokenBucketRateLimiter.allow to async, updated rate limiter tests to await the port, and documented the breaking async RateLimiter change in README/CHANGELOG under 0.6.0. Verified with ruff check, ruff format --check, mypy(src), and full pytest (174 passed).
